meta.title: Terms of Service | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Terms of service for Eagle Logistics website and shipping mediation services.

sections.title: Service Description
sections.body: Eagle Logistics operates as a logistics mediation center. We compare and coordinate shipments through third-party courier partners. We are not the carrier of record unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: Rates & Quotes
sections.body: Rates displayed on our website are estimates from our rate card. Final pricing may vary based on actual weight, dimensions, destination zone, and partner availability. Confirm final quotes before shipping.

sections.title: Promotional Offers
sections.body: Promotional codes (e.g. EAGLE15) are subject to terms, validity dates, and eligibility. Offers cannot be combined unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: Tracking
sections.body: Tracking links redirect to partner courier websites. Eagle Logistics is not responsible for the accuracy or availability of third-party tracking systems.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the extent permitted by law, Eagle Logistics is not liable for delays, loss, or damage occurring during partner carrier transit. Claims should be directed per the selected partner's policies.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: Questions about these terms: hello@eaglelogistics.in or our Contact page.
